age_range.evidence: The study included 490 adolescents and young adults, aged between 12 and 25 years old.

fieldwork_year.evidence: Participants were recruited online between November 2012 and February 2013

gender_split.evidence: Among them, 76% (n=348) were women and 24% were men (n=108).

sample_size.evidence: Total sample of our study was composed of 456 participants
